purpose_en: Interactive verification layer — mechanic observation without pedagogical or rubric inference.
invariant_en: Mechanic observation does not imply pedagogical or rubric inference.
invariant_ar: مراقبة الميكانيك ≠ استنتاج تربوي أو rubric.

observation_discipline.record: what was observed during interactive play

default_test_sequence.prompt_en: Does Space start the game from the start screen?
observed_allowed_examples_en: start panel remained visible after Space

default_test_sequence.prompt_en: Does jump work after the game has started?
observed_allowed_examples_en: player jumped on Space when grounded
Space triggered start instead of jump
score UI incremented on cup collection
no score change on cup contact

default_test_sequence.prompt_en: Does the third cup trigger a level transition?
observed_allowed_examples_en: level transition failed or error observed

default_test_sequence.prompt_en: What happens when the timer reaches zero?
observed_allowed_examples_en: timer reached 00:00 with no gameplay consequence
game over triggered at timer zero
level failed state observed at timer zero

default_test_sequence.prompt_en: What happens when all three lives are lost?
observed_allowed_examples_en: game over panel shown after third loss

contradiction_severity_after_playtest.confirmed: hypothesis observed in playtest — hold remains, severity may increase
contradiction_severity_after_playtest.refuted: hypothesis not observed — code-only concern, not runtime-confirmed
contradiction_severity_after_playtest.inconclusive: playtest did not reach condition — remains advisory

observation_classification_v1.purpose_en: Lightweight epistemic tagging — not severity, not rubric meaning.

assisted.label_en: Assisted pass — input injection and log tail only

visual_human.label_en: Human visual pass — observable state transitions only

boundaries_en: assisted interaction without observable state change remains epistemically insufficient
code inspection (structural hypothesis) must not collapse into runtime observation (phenomenological evidence)

central_contradiction_outcomes_en.transition_succeeds: scene_name_mismatch hypothesis weakened — not refuted alone
central_contradiction_outcomes_en.unreachable_inconclusive: runtime opacity persists — legitimacy remains blocked

visual_pass_recording_discipline.prevents_chain_en: observed transition → mechanic meaning → gameplay quality → rubric legitimacy
visual_pass_recording_discipline.do_not_record_en: evaluation completion · system validation · rubric meaning · semantic completion
visual_pass_recording_discipline.constitutional_role_en: Human visual corroboration discipline — not legitimacy grant, but prevention of automatic observation-to-inference collapse.
visual_pass_recording_discipline.question_shift_en: Not 'Did the runtime execute?' but 'Which observed state transitions can survive epistemic restraint?'

examples.good_en: scene remained Level 1 after third cup
player fell and respawned at checkpoint
timer reached 00:00 with no observed event
